./TASK.md:1:# Task: Upgrade the lead summary flow to a LeadChannelDigest contract
./TASK.md:3:The lead follow-up slice needs a channel-oriented contract upgrade that should propagate through the API, workflow state, and downstream lookup request.
./TASK.md:6:1. Introduce a new record type named `LeadChannelDigest` with this exact schema: `company : Str`, `sourceChannel : Str`, `campaignTag : Str`, `owner : Str`.

./TASK.md:9:4. Update the lead summary API route so it returns `LeadChannelDigest`.

item.text: I found a very small surface: [`Main.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-6Svuxa/Main.clasp) and [`Shared/Lead.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-6Svuxa/Shared/Lead.clasp). I’m reading those now to align the new digest contract across types, route, workflow state, and `main`.

I have enough context. I’m updating the shared contracts and the main flow together: add `LeadChannelDigest`, swap the playbook lookup over to `sourceChannel` and `campaignTag`, retarget the workflow/API to the digest type, and make `main` read the new campaign tag so it evaluates to `\"inbound-high\"`.

The first contract file is updated. I hit a context mismatch in [`Main.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-6Svuxa/Main.clasp), so I’m re-reading that file and applying a tighter patch rather than broadening the edit surface.

I’m applying the flow edits in [`Main.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-6Svuxa/Main.clasp) now, and I’m avoiding any uncertain string operator by using explicit channel tags per priority so the program stays easy to compile.
The contract swap is in place. I’m running the required workspace verification now to catch any type or syntax issues before I stop.

item.text:
Updated the lead summary flow to use `LeadChannelDigest` end to end. In [Shared/Lead.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-6Svuxa/Shared/Lead.clasp), I added the new record with the required schema, changed `LeadPlaybookLookup` to `sourceChannel` and `campaignTag`, and moved workflow state to `digest : LeadChannelDigest`. In [Main.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-channel-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-6Svuxa/Main.clasp), `summarizeLead` and the API route now return `LeadChannelDigest`, the downstream lookup request is mapped from that digest, and `main` now evaluates the new `campaignTag`.

Verification passed with `bash scripts/verify.sh`, and `main` resolves to `"inbound-high"`.
